title: phlegmariurus henryi
intro: Phlegmariurus henryi, also known as the Henry's climbing fork, is a species of plant in the lycopodiaceae family, specifically a type of club moss. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus henryi are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
